title: Lets inject LCL into people Speculation Thread
display_title: Lets inject LCL into people Speculation Thread
wikitext:
[]: Lets inject LCL into people! (Speculation Thread)             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:07 pm What would you think would happen if someone decided to inject LCL into, lets say a patient thats been cut up everywhere because of blah-blah-blah. Me: Healed from the wounds faster (It has a link to primordial ooze, correct? If primordial ooze is what created human life, wouldn't it be able to at least regenerate it? It not being able to do so is like saying a mom can't nourish her baby because she gave birth to it.) wouldn't need to breathe (already oxygenated), and strength level up 10 (for lols).

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:10 pm I don’t think it would have any effect. Ritsuko took a swim in LCL after getting shot in EOE and it didn’t seem help her much.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:15 pm It will make you happy and horny for Asuka!!!! YEAH, COME ON, Shinji!!! LET'S F**K THAT BITCH AND GET SH*T-FACED!!!!! BOO-YAAAAAAHHH!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:19 pm That's the leading cause of death by overdose of Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:23 pm You'd get a corpse filled with LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Mar 16, 2011 3:50 pm Child of Lilith: Well, I think it would be something that would happen over time (hence regeneration), instead of instantaneously. And anyways, we wouldn't be able to tell if it does heal overtime because her body becomes primordial ooze before anything visible could occur. But that's just me. Shogo-Kun: ....No comment.... NemZ: I have noted that you said overdose in your post. I usually believe that most people die from medical appliances because they overdose on them. Perhaps if she didn't overdose, she could've benefited from such? I don't know. Allemann: Um.... okay?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Mar 16, 2011 4:26 pm You die. You inject things that is not blood of your blood type into vital arteries and stuff, you die. LCL may be a fictional LIQUIDBREATHINGLILITHPEELOL liquid, but that still doesn´t mean that that it´ll magically cure people and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Wed Mar 16, 2011 4:44 pm I'm not sure, but what about that name? I'm still waiting for an answer on that.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:05 pm I don't think it would do anything at all. After all, the humans of NGE aren't actually human, and are actually made of LCL. The most that could probably happen is the restocking of lost biomass. Now, what would happen if you injected actual humans with LCL? . . . I have no idea. It's a fictional compound with few stated properties after all.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:26 pm Cody MacArthur Fett wrote: he humans of NGE aren't actually human, and are actually made of LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:32 pm I don't think people would be happy if you tried to inject tang into their bodies.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:38 pm InstrumentalityOne: I find your reasoning flawed. People actually use snake venom (Yes, snake venom, the stuff that is supposed to kill you) for medical treatments, and it actually works. And anyways, you are incorrect about actually "Dying". You don't die, its just that the white blood cells detect the new blood as a virus, and destroy it, and that is because the DNA in that blood does not match. Why shouldn't LCL, considering that the DNA in the Angels are 99.98% the same as human DNA? In fact, what makes us so sure that it even contains DNA? And anyways, the blood they use for transfusions probably isn't any better.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:42 pm Since we're all speculating baseless bullshit, I say that if you inject LCL directly into the body YOU'LL FUCKING EXPLODE.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:50 pm C.A.P. wrote: I'm not sure, but what about that name? I'm still waiting for an answer on that.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Wed Mar 16, 2011 5:51 pm Stryker wrote: InstrumentalityOne: I find your reasoning flawed. People actually use snake venom (Yes, snake venom, the stuff that is supposed to kill you) for medical treatments, and it actually works.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Mar 16, 2011 7:26 pm Azathoth wrote: Lilith Cunt Liquid. Or "Creation" if you're boring.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Wed Mar 16, 2011 9:38 pm Make them drink it, say it's a new kind of drink, maybe add some sweeteners, if they like it(probably won't); you've got your own drink you can market. PROFIT!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Mar 16, 2011 9:40 pm Tankred wrote: Make them drink it, say it's a new kind of drink, maybe add some sweeteners, if they like it(probably won't); you've got your own drink you can market. PROFIT!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Wed Mar 16, 2011 10:07 pm KnightmareX13 wrote: with zero manufacturing cost it is a easy win, that is along as the customers don't find out that it is from the cunt of a alien life form crucified in the basement.

[]:             Quote Post by Seen » Wed Mar 16, 2011 10:25 pm Sachi wrote: Since we're all speculating baseless bullshit, I say that if you inject LCL directly into the body YOU'LL FUCKING EXPLODE.
